title: 私は独りでさまようばかり

text_block_list.text:
After some time out together, Meisho Doto and I
return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! Would you mind if, after this, we...
Bzzt, bzzt!

It's a message from Tazuna. Looks like there's an
important task that needs a lot of hands on deck.
She's asked me to help out.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I s-suppose you have work to do now...
choice_data_list:
Wasn't there something you were going to tell
me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it was nothing! Good luck with y-your
work!

I reluctantly part ways with Meisho Doto,
switching gears to my new task.

After everything is put in order, I step outside to
find the sky completely dark. I guess I should
head home.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey. You're Doto's trainer, aren't you? Got any
idea where she is?
choice_data_list: I thought she was back at her dorm...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Around this time, she's normally making a
racket getting ready for the next day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, I swear, if that accident on legs runs into
trouble this late at night... Where the hell could
she be?

We've got to find her as soon as possible! I go
looking for Meisho Doto with Air Shakur.

Shakur has a guess as to Doto's whereabouts, so I
trust her gut and follow along to...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you haven't noticed, she's been sneaking out
here a lot lately. And tracking mud into our room
when she sneaks back...
Oooh... Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm? You hear that?
Ahh... I reminisce on your gentle... waarmth!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! T-Trainer! Shakur?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm n-n-not imagining things, right? Is that really...
you?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You sleep-deprived or something? Of course it's
us!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh... Waaaahh! I was s-so scaaared!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hic... I'm so s-sorry...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I decided to practice my singing here, but then... Hic! I c-couldn't find my way back in the dark... I was singing to help me calm down.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry I wasn't there for you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, please don't apologize... Your work is far
more important than me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to become... more independent. That
way, you'll be able to focus on your work, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I don't want to be a nuisance to you...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You should focus on screwing up less first. Surely
you could've avoided what led you into this mess.

We escort Meisho Doto back to the dorm.
Thankfully, she's not injured. I suppose all is calm
for now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so ashamed to have caused all th-this trouble!
I'm really sorry... it's all my fault! I won't do
something like this ever again!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Damn right, you won't! I'm not going looking for
you a second time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I u-understand... I'm so s-sorry! I won't practice
singing anymore!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But, what if something like this happens
again?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Figure it out on your own! I already said I'm not
playing search patrol anymore.
choice_data_list: What do you want to do, Doto?
What do you want to do, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I, um... Well, you see! I think I like singing a lot
more now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If it's not a b-bother to anyone... I would like to
keep singing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Then you'd better come up with a more
reasonable way to practice.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! Um, well... I won't sing in the forest
anymore!
choice_data_list:
I'd like to hear the song whenever you're ready
to perform.
Let me join you for practice!
Let me join you for practice!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! Um, well... I won't sing in the forest
anymore!
choice_data_list:
I'd like to hear the song whenever you're ready
to perform.
Let me join you for practice!
Let me join you for practice!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah?! You're willing to listen to m-my singing?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whaaat?! I'll practice a whole, whole lot, then.
I pwo-promishe!

Ever since then, I occasionally overhear Doto
singing when I pass by the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't! I already rely on you for training...
this would add on so much work for you!
choice_data_list: I want to be with you as you improve.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well... If you're really sure you want to come...

I decide to accompany Meisho Doto for singing
practice the following day.
